framing.description: §5.7 Part B: per-transaction amortization table, derived from the single-client batch-occupancy sweep in artifacts/throughput_results.json's 'occupancy_sweep' (vendor_server_160, hoisted_tree_sum, 160-bit chain, PPFD_GRPC_THREADS=4). amortization_factor is per_tx_us(lanes=1) / per_tx_us(lanes=N): how many times cheaper, per transaction, a batch of N is relative to a single-transaction request.
